text: Excellent comparison as always. However, it is worth noting a significant variable regarding the Galaxy S26 Ultra. As a brand-new device, it is still in its 'learning usage patterns' phase. During the first week or two, the system is aggressively indexing files, synchronising accounts, and the AI is calibrating performance profiles based on user behaviour. This background activity typically leads to higher thermal output and accelerated battery drain. Since the S25 Ultra in this test is already fully optimised and 'settled', it holds a distinct advantage in efficiency and stability. A re-test in two weeks would likely yield more accurate results once the S26 Ultra’s background processes have stabilised.
